allowAccountModification.title: Allow Account Modification
allowAccountModification.description: If false, the system disables modification of accounts, such as Apple Accounts, and internet-based accounts, such as Mail, Contacts, and Calendar.

allowActivityContinuation.title: Allow Handoff
allowActivityContinuation.description: If false, the system disables activity continuation. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices and with Managed Apple Accounts is deprecated.

allowAddingGameCenterFriends.title: Allow Adding Game Center Friends
allowAddingGameCenterFriends.description: If false, the system prohibits adding friends to Game Center.

allowAirPlayIncomingRequests.title: Allow Incoming AirPlay Requests
allowAirPlayIncomingRequests.description: If false, the system disables incoming AirPlay requests.

allowAirPrintiBeaconDiscovery.title: Allow Discovery of AirPrint Printers Using iBeacons
allowAirPrintiBeaconDiscovery.description: If false, the system disables iBeacon discovery of AirPrint printers, which prevents spurious AirPrint Bluetooth beacons from phishing for network traffic.

allowApplePersonalizedAdvertising.title: Allow Apple Personalized Advertising
allowApplePersonalizedAdvertising.description: If false, the system limits Apple personalized advertising.

allowARDRemoteManagementModification.title: Allow Modifying Remote Management Sharing Setting
allowARDRemoteManagementModification.description: If false, the system prevents modifying the Remote Management Sharing setting in System Settings.

allowAutoUnlock.title: Allow Apple Watch to Auto Unlock Device
allowAutoUnlock.description: If false, the system disallows auto unlock. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

allowBluetoothModification.title: Allow Modifying Bluetooth Settings
allowBluetoothModification.description: If false, the system prevents modification of Bluetooth settings.

allowBluetoothSharingModification.title: Allow Modifying Bluetooth Sharing Setting
allowBluetoothSharingModification.description: If false, the system prevents modifying Bluetooth settings in System Settings.

allowBookstore.title: Allow Bookstore
allowBookstore.description: If false, the system removes the Book Store tab from the Books app.

allowBookstoreErotica.title: Allow Bookstore Erotica
allowBookstoreErotica.description: If false, the system prevents the user from downloading Apple Books media that's tagged as erotica.

allowCamera.title: Allow Camera
allowCamera.description: If false, the system disables the camera and removes its icon from the Home Screen, and users are unable to take photographs.

allowCloudAddressBook.title: Allow iCloud Contacts
allowCloudAddressBook.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Contacts services.

allowCloudBookmarks.title: Allow iCloud Bookmarks
allowCloudBookmarks.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Bookmark sync.

allowCloudBTMM.title: Allow iCloud Back to My Mac

allowCloudCalendar.title: Allow iCloud Calendar
allowCloudCalendar.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Calendar services.

allowCloudDesktopAndDocuments.title: Allow iCloud Desktop & Documents
allowCloudDesktopAndDocuments.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Desktop and Document services.

allowCloudDocumentSync.title: Allow iCloud Drive
allowCloudDocumentSync.description: If false, the system disables document and key-value syncing to iCloud.

allowCloudFreeform.title: Allow iCloud Freeform
allowCloudFreeform.description: If false, the system disallows iCloud Freeform services.

allowCloudKeychainSync.title: Allow iCloud Keychain
allowCloudKeychainSync.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Keychain synchronization.

allowCloudMail.title: Allow iCloud Mail
allowCloudMail.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Mail services.

allowCloudNotes.title: Allow iCloud Notes
allowCloudNotes.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Notes services.

allowCloudPhotoLibrary.title: Allow iCloud Photo Library
allowCloudPhotoLibrary.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Photo Library.

allowCloudPrivateRelay.title: Allow iCloud Private Relay
allowCloudPrivateRelay.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Private Relay.

allowCloudReminders.title: Allow iCloud Reminders
allowCloudReminders.description: If false, the system disables iCloud Reminder services.

allowContentCaching.title: Allow Content Caching
allowContentCaching.description: If false, the system disables content caching. This restriction is not supported on the user channel.

allowDeprecatedWebKitTLS.title: Allow Accessing Websites Using TLS 1.0 and 1.1
allowDeprecatedWebKitTLS.description: Allow websites that use TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 to be accessed using Safari.

allowDeviceNameModification.title: Allow Modifying Device Name
allowDeviceNameModification.description: If false, the system prevents the user from changing the device name.

allowDiagnosticSubmission.title: Allow Submitting Diagnostic and Usage Data to Apple
allowDiagnosticSubmission.description: If false, prevents the device from automatically submitting diagnostic reports to Apple.

allowEraseContentAndSettings.title: Allow Erase All Content and Settings
allowEraseContentAndSettings.description: If false, the system disables the Erase All Content and Settings option in the Reset UI.

allowFileSharingModification.title: Allow Modifying File Sharing Setting
allowFileSharingModification.description: If false, the system prevents modifying File Sharing setting in System Settings.

allowFindMyDevice.title: Allow Find My Device
allowFindMyDevice.description: If false, the system disables Find My Device in the Find My app.

allowFindMyFriends.title: Allow Find My Friends
allowFindMyFriends.description: If false, the system disables Find My Friends in the Find My app.

allowFingerprintForUnlock.title: Allow Touch ID / Face ID to Unlock Device
allowFingerprintForUnlock.description: If false, the system prevents Touch ID, Face ID, or Optic ID from unlocking a device.

allowFingerprintModification.title: Allow Modifying Touch ID Fingerprints
allowFingerprintModification.description: If false, the system prevents the user from modifying Touch ID or Face ID.

allowGameCenter.title: Allow Game Center
allowGameCenter.description: If false, the system disables Game Center, and the system removes its icon from the Home Screen.

allowInternetSharingModification.title: Allow Modifying Internet Sharing Setting
allowInternetSharingModification.description: If false, the system prevents modifying the Internet Sharing setting in System Settings.

allowiPhoneMirroring.title: Allow iPhone Mirroring
allowiPhoneMirroring.description: If false, prohibits the use of iPhone Mirroring. In macOS, this prevents the Mac from mirroring any iPhone.

allowiTunesFileSharing.title: Allow iTunes File Sharing
allowiTunesFileSharing.description: If false, the system disables iTunes file sharing services.

allowLiveVoicemail.title: Allow Live Voicemail
allowLiveVoicemail.description: If false, the system disables live voicemail on the device.

allowLocalUserCreation.title: Allow Creating Users in System Settings
allowLocalUserCreation.description: If false, the system prevents creating users in System Settings.

allowMediaSharingModification.title: Allow Modifying Media Sharing Setting
allowMediaSharingModification.description: If false, prevents modification of Media Sharing settings.

allowMultiplayerGaming.title: Allow Multiplayer Gaming
allowMultiplayerGaming.description: If false, the system prohibits multiplayer gaming.

allowMusicService.title: Allow Apple Music
allowMusicService.description: If false, the system disables the Music service, and the Music app reverts to classic mode.

allowNotificationsModification.title: Allow Modifying Notifications Settings
allowNotificationsModification.description: If false, the system disables modification of notification settings.

allowPasswordAutoFill.title: Allow Password AutoFill
allowPasswordAutoFill.description: If false, the system disables AutoFill Passwords feature, prompting to use saved passwords, automatic strong passwords, and suggesting strong passwords.

allowPasswordProximityRequests.title: Allow Proximity Based Password Sharing Requests
allowPasswordProximityRequests.description: If false, the system disables requesting passwords from nearby devices.

allowPasswordSharing.title: Allow Password Sharing
allowPasswordSharing.description: If false, the system disables sharing passwords with the AirDrop passwords feature, or with the Passwords app.

allowPasscodeModification.title: Allow Modifying Passcode
allowPasscodeModification.description: If false, the system prevents adding, changing, or removing the passcode.

allowPrinterSharingModification.title: Allow Modifying Printer Sharing Setting
allowPrinterSharingModification.description: If false, the system prevents modifying Printer Sharing settings in System Settings.

allowRemoteAppleEventsModification.title: Allow Modifying Remote Apple Events Sharing Setting
allowRemoteAppleEventsModification.description: If false, the system prevents modifying Remote Apple Events Sharing settings in System Settings.

allowRemoteScreenObservation.title: Allow AirPlay and View Screen by Classroom App
allowRemoteScreenObservation.description: If false, the system disables remote screen observation by the Classroom app. If allowScreenShot is false, the Classroom app doesn't observe remote screens.

allowRosettaUsageAwareness.title: Allow Rosetta Usage Awareness
allowRosettaUsageAwareness.description: If false, disables Rosetta usage awareness. When Rosetta usage awareness is active, a pop-up dialog is displayed to the user when an app that is using Rosetta is launched.

allowSafariHistoryClearing.title: Allow Safari History Clearing
allowSafariHistoryClearing.description: If false, the system disables the ability to clear browsing history in Safari.

allowSafariPrivateBrowsing.title: Allow Safari Private Browsing
allowSafariPrivateBrowsing.description: If false, the system disables the ability to use private browsing in Safari.

allowScreenShot.title: Allow Screenshots and Screen Recording
allowScreenShot.description: If false, the system disables saving a screenshot of the display and capturing a screen recording. It also disables the Classroom app from observing remote screens.

allowSpotlightInternetResults.title: Allow Siri Suggestions
allowSpotlightInternetResults.description: If false, the system disables Spotlight Internet search results in Siri Suggestions.

allowStartupDiskModification.title: Allow Modifying Startup Disk Settings
allowStartupDiskModification.description: If false, the system prevents modification of Startup Disk settings in System Settings.

allowTimeMachineBackup.title: Allow Modifying Time Machine Settings
allowTimeMachineBackup.description: If false, the system prevents modification of Time Machine settings in System Settings. This restriction is not supported on the user channel.

allowUIConfigurationProfileInstallation.title: Allow User Installation of Configuration Profiles
allowUIConfigurationProfileInstallation.description: If false, the system prohibits the user from installing configuration profiles and certificates interactively.

allowUniversalControl.title: Allow Universal Control
allowUniversalControl.description: If false, the system disables Universal Control.

allowUSBRestrictedMode.title: Allow USB Restricted Mode
allowUSBRestrictedMode.description: If false, allows new USB and Thunderbolt accessories, and SD cards to connect without authorization.

allowWallpaperModification.title: Allow Modifying Wallpaper
allowWallpaperModification.description: If false, the system prevents changing the wallpaper.

enforcedFingerprintTimeout.title: Enforced Fingerprint Timeout
enforcedFingerprintTimeout.description: Period of time in seconds after which the device will require entry of password or passcode to unlock. The default value is 48 hours.

forceAirPrintTrustedTLSRequirement.title: Disallow AirPrint to Destinations with Untrusted Certificates
forceAirPrintTrustedTLSRequirement.description: If true, the system requires trusted certificates for TLS printing communication.

forceAutomaticDateAndTime.title: Force Automatic Date and Time
forceAutomaticDateAndTime.description: If true, the system enables the Set Automatically feature in Date & Time and the user can't disable it.

forceBypassScreenCaptureAlert.title: Force Bypass Screen Capture Alert
forceBypassScreenCaptureAlert.description: If true, then the system bypasses the presentation of a screen capture alert.

forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses.title: Automatically Join Classroom Classes Without Prompting
forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses.description: If true, the system automatically gives permission to the teacher's requests without prompting the student.

forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveCl.title: Require Teacher Permission to Leave Classroom App Unmanaged Classes
forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveCl.description: If true, a student enrolled in an unmanaged course through Classroom needs to request permission from the teacher to leave the course.

forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock.title: Allow Classroom to Lock Apps or the Device Without Prompting
forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock.description: If true, the system allows the teacher to lock apps or the device without prompting the student.

forceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservatio.title: Allow Classroom App to Perform AirPlay and View Screen Without Prompting
forceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservatio.description: If true and ScreenObservationPermissionModificationAllowed is also true in the Education payload, a student enrolled in a managed course through the Classroom app automatically gives permission to that course teacher's requests to observe the student's screen without prompting the student.

ratingApps.title: Apps Ranking Number
ratingApps.description: The maximum level of app content allowed on the device. 1000=All, 0=None. See Apple documentation for full age rating values.

ratingMovies.title: Movies Ranking Number
ratingMovies.description: The maximum level of movie content allowed on the device. 1000=All, 500=NC-17, 400=R, 300=PG-13, 200=PG, 100=G, 0=None

ratingTVShows.title: TV Shows Ranking Number
ratingTVShows.description: The maximum level of TV content allowed on the device. 1000=All, 600=TV-MA, 500=TV-14, 400=TV-PG, 300=TV-G, 200=TV-Y7, 100=TV-Y, 0=None

safariAllowAutoFill.title: Allow AutoFill in Safari
safariAllowAutoFill.description: If false, the system disables Safari AutoFill for passwords, contact info, and credit cards, and also prevents using the Keychain for AutoFill.
